name: SK Wasif Abdullah Musa
bio: Dreamt of building Bangladesh's own AI ecosystem. Founded Craftly to give every developer the power of AI without depending on foreign APIs.

projects.name: AgenticHelper
projects.desc: An AI assistant that automates daily tasks on Android.

featured_post: Alhamdulillah, Team Craftly secured 3rd place at the District Level of National Science and Technology Week — promoted to Chittagong Divisional Level! 🏆

name: Mahadi Islam Alif
bio: Building the future of AI in Bangladesh. Part of the Craftly Robot core team. Passionate about Android development and collective intelligence.

projects.name: FoodieExpress
projects.desc: Complete food delivery solution built in 60 seconds with AI.

projects.name: SkyCast BD
projects.desc: Hyper-local Bangladesh weather with AI rain prediction.

featured_post: 🤖 Craftly Robot — Bangladesh's First Homegrown AI. No foreign APIs, no ChatGPT dependence, completely ours! 🚀🇧🇩

name: Sifat Hasan
bio: Specializing in large language model fine-tuning and dataset curation for Bangla-language AI systems.

projects.name: BanglaGPT Dataset
projects.desc: The largest open Bangla text corpus for AI training.

featured_post: Just finished annotating 200k Bangla sentences for the Craftly Robot training pipeline. Every word matters. 💪

name: Anika Tabassum
bio: Designing intuitive interfaces for AI-powered applications. Believe that great technology needs equally great design to reach everyone.

projects.name: Craftly Design System
projects.desc: The visual language behind all Craftly products.

featured_post: Launched the Craftly Internet design system today. 120 components, dark mode ready, and optimized for low-bandwidth users in Bangladesh. 🎨

name: Nabil Rahman
bio: Building the invisible engine behind Craftly Internet. Obsessed with performance, scale, and clean architecture.

projects.name: CraftlyAPI
projects.desc: The core REST and GraphQL API powering Craftly Internet.

featured_post: Craftly API just handled 50k requests in a single minute during the science fair live demo. Zero downtime. All homegrown infra. 🔥

name: Riya Chowdhury
bio: Android developer with 3 years of experience. Joined Craftly to help make AI-generated apps production-quality.

projects.name: StudyBuddy BD
projects.desc: AI-powered study assistant for Bangladeshi students.

featured_post: StudyBuddy BD just crossed 3,000 downloads! Built it in one weekend using Craftly Robot. This is the future. 📚
